info.title: mamba_torch_causal_fulldev
info.subtitle: High-Performance Dependency Injection for Python 3.12
info.description:
🌀 THE KANISH CODEX: Offline Architecture

Welcome to Project Kanish. This embedded panel contains the exact, modified code required to deploy and execute our Paleo-NLP engine in an offline Kaggle environment without collapsing the Tesla T4 GPU.
info.userSpecifiedSources: > **Compiled on NVIDIA Tesla T4 using official CUDA 12.1 toolchain within a controlled container environment.**
